overall.description: Gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a vehicle driving through a futuristic dystopian city at dusk. The journey transitions from street level to elevated highways, passing through industrial zones and into the dense neon-lit downtown core with massive digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning to elevated highway

events.description: white sports car ahead turns right at intersection and exits view
vehicle ascends from street level onto elevated highway ramp

agents.ego_description: driving through urban intersection and ascending onto elevated highway ramp

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving ahead before turning right at intersection

entered.detail: large blue shipping container truck parked on left side of street
white sports car with illuminated red taillights driving ahead
yellow SUV vehicle parked on left side of road
large digital billboard displaying red and white graphics
concrete elevated highway ramp entrance structure

segments.scene_description: The vehicle starts at street level behind a white sports car, surrounded by urban buildings and parked vehicles. After the sports car turns right at the intersection, the vehicle ascends onto an elevated highway ramp, leaving the street-level containers and SUVs behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated industrial highway with distant smokestacks

agents.ego_description: cruising along elevated highway with industrial district visible in the distance

entered.detail: metal safety guardrails along the edge of elevated highway
tall industrial chimneys emitting smoke on the horizon
low-rise industrial structures with illuminated windows
overhead electrical transmission towers and cables

segments.scene_description: Traveling along the elevated highway, the scene opens to reveal an industrial district with smokestacks on the horizon. The road curves gently with guardrails visible on both sides, and the lighting remains natural dusk with minimal neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway curve transitioning to commercial district

events.description: industrial landscape transitions to dense commercial district with neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating curved elevated highway while approaching the neon-lit city center

entered.detail: concrete overpass structure crossing above the roadway ahead
tall buildings with illuminated neon advertisements and signage
large vertical digital advertising screens on building facades

segments.scene_description: The highway curves through a transition zone where industrial buildings give way to commercial towers. Neon signage begins to dominate the skyline as the vehicle approaches an overpass, with massive digital billboards appearing on the left side of the road.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense downtown cyberpunk district with multi-level highways

events.description: entering major downtown intersection with massive digital billboards and neon towers

agents.ego_description: driving through dense downtown district with heavy neon signage and multiple highway levels

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving ahead through the downtown intersection

entered.detail: large billboard with 'WATSON WHORE' text in pink neon letters
tightly packed high-rise buildings covered in digital advertisements
complex highway interchange with multiple elevated road levels and ramps

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters the heart of the cyberpunk downtown, surrounded by towering skyscrapers covered in massive neon advertisements. The 'WATSON WHORE' billboard dominates the left side as the vehicle navigates through a complex multi-level highway interchange, with dense commercial buildings lining both sides of the road.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a gritty street-level urban environment that gradually ascends into a towering, neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. It begins behind a white sports car amidst parked vehicles and containers before the camera climbs an elevated highway ramp, leaving the street level behind. As the vehicle travels along the curving road, the scene opens up to reveal a distant industrial district characterized by smokestacks and natural dusk lighting. The environment then shifts as industrial buildings give way to commercial towers, with neon signage beginning to dominate the skyline and massive digital billboards appearing along the route. Finally, the camera enters the heart of the downtown core, navigating a complex multi-level interchange surrounded by skyscrapers and the overwhelming glow of the Watson Whore advertisement.
